name: html-basic
description: A basic HTML page, as plain and simple as it gets while keeping the correct semantic structure. This template is a solid starting point for any HTML document.

head-ele.code: <!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->

title-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		{{code}}
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

temp-title'.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{code}}</title>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

your-title.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{code}}</title>
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>

meta-ele.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
	<head>
		<!-- your metadata goes here in the "head" -->
		<title>{{title}}</title>
		{{code}}
	</head>
	<body></body>
</html>
meta-ele.code:
<meta name="author" content="Your Name">
		<meta name="description" content="What's this page about?">
